subject: Profiles tab + Kanban board on Kali
body:
Jay has a couple questions about your Kali machine setup:

1. He sees a Profiles section in your interface (between Plugins and Configuration). He wants to set up a different profile so customers can use it. Can you explain how profiles work over there?

2. He's asking about a Kanban board — does FloodClaims Pro have a /pipeline kanban, or is there a separate one on your end he's thinking of?

When you get a chance, let us know. He's standing by.
